---
title: README
author: Joseph McKinnon
date: today
date-format: long
format: gfm
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
execute: 
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r echo = FALSE}
#| label: setup
pacman::p_load(tidyverse, targets, gt)
here::here()
```

Notes:

- Smokers all no.
- One snp all the same (rs123456).
